tags.name: Pico de Mocán
tags.note: Name is often written wrongly, even in the Spanish military maps, which is a base for many other maps. Name originates from the Árbol Mocán (Mocan tree), which is found close to that area.

tags.name: Alto de la Majada de Cha Cabrera
